name: Sheh Fung Screws Co., Ltd.
summary: Sheh Fung Screws Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells screws primarily in Taiwan. The company provides various screws, including self-drilling, timber construction, drywall, chipboard, self-tapping, decking, self-piercing screws, and other screws. It also offers hammer drill bits, customized fastener parts, kaitex coatings, and packing boxes. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
